title: Broomfield Heavy Rain
lead: A critical heavy rain event is affecting Broomfield, with a Z-Score of -4.11. This extreme weather anomaly has a score of 10.0/10, indicating a highly unusual occurrence.
body:
The heavy rain in Broomfield is causing significant disruptions, with high humidity levels at 91% and moderate winds at 13.4 km/h. 
 The HDD value of 15.4 GG indicates a substantial heating demand, while the CDD value of 0.0 GG shows no cooling demand. 
 The Umidita level of 91% and Vento of 13.4 km/h are exacerbating the flooding situation, making it a critical event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of the heavy rain in Broomfield.
